## Rules

- `Fix` legend:
  - `рџ”§` = autofixable
  - `рџ’Ў` = suggestions available
  - `вЂ”` = report only
- `Preset key` legend:
  - [рџџў](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/minimal) вЂ” [`typefest.configs.minimal`](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/minimal)
  - [рџџЎ](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/recommended) вЂ” [`typefest.configs.recommended`](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/recommended)
  - [рџџ ](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/recommended-type-checked) вЂ” [`typefest.configs["recommended-type-checked"]`](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/recommended-type-checked)
  - [рџ”ґ](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/strict) вЂ” [`typefest.configs.strict`](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/strict)

  - [рџ§Є](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/experimental) вЂ” [`typefest.configs.experimental`](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/experimental)
  - [рџ’ ](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/type-fest-types) вЂ” [`typefest.configs["type-fest/types"]`](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/type-fest-types)
  - [вњґпёЏ](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/ts-extras-type-guards) вЂ” [`typefest.configs["ts-extras/type-guards"]`](https://nick2bad4u.github.io/eslint-plugin-typefest/docs/rules/presets/ts-extras-type-guards)
